continuity.rationale: The configured SEC CIK and common-stock listing identify one continuous filing entity and security class.
The configured SEC CIK and common-stock listing identify one continuous restaurant-issuer filing entity and security class.
The configured SEC CIK and common-stock listing identify one continuous financial-institution filing entity and security class.

assignments.rationale: Microsoft is a recurring-revenue cloud and software platform issuer; its accepted lens prioritizes cloud, backlog, capex, depreciation, margin, cash-conversion, and dilution drivers over the shared statements.

Chipotle is a company-operated restaurant issuer; its accepted lens prioritizes comparable-restaurant sales, unit count, restaurant-level operating margin, and lease-adjusted leverage, and it keeps the raw leverage checks visible beside the operating-lease and treasury-stock context.

JPMorgan is a bank holding company; its accepted lens prioritizes deposits, net interest margin, CET1 capital, liquidity coverage, and preferred capital, and it marks the ordinary industrial liabilities/equity and net-debt/EBITDA heuristics inapplicable under the financial-institution policy.

formulas.expression: net-income / revenue (source-available margin proxy; a dedicated operating-income mapping is pending a company-facts capture)
operating-lease-liability / stockholders-equity (context beside the raw funded-debt leverage; never replaces the reported figure)

peers.purpose: Software-platform peer context for Microsoft; peer publications are materialized in a later increment, so this set is proposed and its runtime comparison observations are constructed and clearly not MSFT-reported values.
